text.title: Fast vs Slow Burn Rule Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: open ticket; review at next office hours
post to review channel; recalibrate at next quarterly
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Which window fired? → matches branch "window == 1h AND burn_rate >= 14.4" → conclusion ref=r2-page-vs-ticket-routing
